    Description
    TableLook(ContainerElement containerElement, int depth, int borderWidth)
    constructor to get a flexible cell size, with inners in 0,0

    getHeight()

    getWidth()
     
    protected void
    render()
    overrides default method that does nothing, because as soon as the TableLook is created, if there are some row/cols that have a fixed size, they must be "visible" on screen
    protected void
    renderBorders()

    • render

      protected void render()
      overrides default method that does nothing, because as soon as the TableLook is created, if there are some row/cols that have a fixed size, they must be "visible" on screen
